title: Lost Poop: The Return of You're a Meshi!
description:
Yeah, many people BEGGED me to make this a long time ago and this was the closest thing I could make for the sequel, it was made a couple days after "Test." was uploaded but the video file was corrupted and off sync so I had to dump it.

This episode is very slow paced and lack many memorable moments to poop so it's ehh... I didn't want to upload but because of specific emails regarding the Sequel I decided to post it.
